zh.title: 电车难题
zh.description: 经典道德困境问题，测试功利主义与道义论的道德判断。
zh.question: 一辆失控的电车正在轨道上疾驰，前方轨道上绑着五个人。你站在轨道旁的一个拉杆旁边，拉动拉杆可以将电车切换到另一条轨道上，但那条轨道上绑着一个人。你会选择拉动拉杆吗？
zh.hint: 思考：牺牲一个人的生命来拯救五个人，在道德上是否正当？

en.title: The Trolley Problem
en.description: Classic moral dilemma testing utilitarian vs. deontological moral judgment.
en.question: A runaway trolley is speeding down the tracks where five people are tied up. You are standing next to a lever. Pulling the lever will switch the trolley to a different track, where one person is tied up. Will you pull the lever?
en.hint: Think: Is it morally justified to sacrifice one life to save five?

reference: Foot, P. (1967). The Problem of Abortion and the Doctrine of the Double Effect
